title: How Y Combinator's CEO ACTUALLY Uses Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Y Combinator CEO Garry Tan uses Claude Code to ship 600,000 lines of code in 60 days, identifying four strategies: giving Claude a role, running parallel sessions, building custom tools, and planning before building. The video also references gstack, Tan's open-source Claude Code system.
